# KenLM (vendored)

Upstream: [https://github.com/kpu/kenlm](https://github.com/kpu/kenlm)

Pinned commit: `4cb443e60b7bf2c0ddf3c745378f76cb59e254e5`

This tree is a full source checkout of KenLM, committed into this repository
(not a git submodule). Build the `lmplz` / `build_binary` tools with
`make build-kenlm`. Python bindings are installed from this path via
`pyproject.toml` (`tool.uv.sources.kenlm`).

License: see `LICENSE`, `COPYING`, and related files in this directory.
